prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 ultra-detailed fantasy fashion portrait of an anime-inspired young woman with cotton-candy pink hair styled into exactly 2 long flowing twin tails, drifting dramatically left and right as if underwater or in zero gravity. Her face is intentionally hidden by a flat centered square censor block in muted dusty pink, covering the entire facial area. She wears a black gothic couture mini dress with sheer translucent sleeves, lace mesh, sparkling beadwork, and abundant pink floral appliqués. Include exactly 7 large prominent pink roses on the outfit and nearby foreground: one on the chest, three clustered at the waist, one lower on the skirt, one at the left edge, and one soft blurred rose in the lower right foreground. Add black-and-pink floral hair ornaments on both sides of her head, a black lace choker, delicate sheer arm ruffles, and tiny white bead strands. Surround her with a dreamy surreal background of floating translucent bubbles, glossy black pearls, pink pearls, black-and-pink patterned spheres, circular vinyl-record-like discs, and fine botanical line-art flowers. Make exactly 3 prominent circular disc motifs visible: one large at the upper right, one small at the lower left, and one partial at the bottom right. Make exactly 10 prominent floating glossy spheres visible in the foreground and midground, mixing pink, black, clear, and patterned surfaces, with additional tiny sparkle particles kept subtle. Use a luminous white and pale pink background, high-key lighting, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, glossy reflections, delicate black ink filigree, and a luxurious hyperreal digital-art finish. Color palette: pastel pink, black, white, and pearl silver. Pose: upper body angled slightly left, one bare shoulder visible, right hand raised gracefully near the face, elegant and ethereal. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
